options.text: I need more coffee in the break room.
A communication workshop and weekly feedback from senior colleagues would be ideal.
I guess I just need to talk more.

content.explanation: 正确答案提出具体、可操作的支持形式（培训+反馈），符合职业发展目标的资源协商语境。其他选项要么无关（opt_1）、模糊无效（opt_3），或逃避目标（opt_4），不具备建设性。
content.speakerText: What kind of support would help you achieve your goal of improving client communication?
content.speakerTextCn: 什么样的支持能帮助你实现提升客户沟通能力的目标？
